message:
feat(node): crash loop detector batch reporting + time travel schema validation

crash_loop_detector.rs (+332 lines):
- New error variant PinConnectorMismatch: rejects rollback pins targeting a
  different connector than the one in crash-loop state
- Batch crash report infrastructure: record_crash_batch() accepts BTreeMap of
  connector crashes, validates and records each, returns per-connector outcomes
- Comprehensive test enrichment: PinConnectorMismatch detection, batch crash
  recording with mixed success/failure, window boundary edge cases, cooldown
  period interaction with batches, deterministic event ordering

time_travel.rs (+89 lines):
- Schema version validation in WorkflowSnapshot::from_bytes(): reject snapshots
  with mismatched schema_version before verifying integrity
- Frame count consistency check: reject if declared frame_count != actual
  frames.len()
- Same validation added to ReplaySession::start() for defense in depth:
  schema version check and integrity verification before accepting snapshot
- New tests: schema version mismatch rejection, frame count mismatch rejection,
  replay start validation, round-trip through serialize+deserialize

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
